caption: Dreamy synthwave with ethereal female vocals, lush atmospheric pads, retro arpeggios, soft reverb-drenched production, 80s nostalgic feel
lyrics:
[intro]
Neon lights reflecting on the rain

[verse]
Cruising down the midnight boulevard
The city glows like scattered cards
Every light a distant star
I wonder where you are

[chorus]
Lost in the neon glow
Everywhere I go
Your voice is in the static
This feeling is ecstatic
Drifting through the night
Everything feels right

[verse]
Synthesizers fill the air
Electric dreams beyond compare
Time moves slow in violet light
Forever feels like tonight

[chorus]
Lost in the neon glow
Everywhere I go
Your voice is in the static
This feeling is ecstatic
Drifting through the night
Everything feels right

[bridge]
The future felt like yesterday
When we were young and far away
Now the past comes flooding back
On this retro synth track

[outro]
Fading into purple haze
Through the neon-soaked maze
